mechanism_narrative: If FEDFUNDS is flat or rising while CPIAUCSL remains elevated, markets infer restrictive policy will stay in place and real discount rates will not fall. That pressure keeps the 10-year Treasury yield moving up over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is at or above 4.25% and CPIAUCSL is above its 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances produce a lower 20d Treasury-yield change than untriggered periods, or if yield declines after rising CPIAUCSL and steady FEDFUNDS in most cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained acceleration in retail sales and payroll growth signals stronger aggregate demand, which raises expected inflation and term premium. Over the next 20 trading days, that combination pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises month-over-month and PAYEMS rises month-over-month
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous RSAFS and PAYEMS gains are followed by a negative or statistically insignificant 20d change in the 10-year yield in a majority of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A falling unemployment rate with rising payrolls indicates labor-market tightness that can lift wage pressure and inflation expectations. That should raise the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 5 trading days as bond investors reprice policy persistence.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls by at least 0.1pp from its prior month while PAYEMS increases
failure_condition: Reject if payroll gains with a lower unemployment rate do not precede a positive 5d Treasury-yield move more often than chance, or if yields fall immediately after repeated trigger events.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production and housing starts indicate stronger real activity and a broader rebound in supply-side utilization. As capacity pressure increases, inflation expectations and nominal yields should rise over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO is above its prior 2-month level and HOUST is above its prior 2-month level
failure_condition: Reject if joint rises in INDPRO and HOUST are followed by flat or negative 20d yield changes more than 60% of the time.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL is decelerating while FEDFUNDS stays restrictive, real rates look less likely to tighten further and bond investors price earlier policy relief. That should pull the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL growth is below its prior 6-month pace and FEDFUNDS remains above 4%
failure_condition: Reject if disinflation with a still-high fed funds rate does not precede lower 20d Treasury yields, or if yields rise in most triggered windows.

mechanism_narrative: A strong quarterly GDP print is a broad demand impulse that lifts expected nominal growth and term premium. After a positive GDPC1 surprise, the 10-year Treasury yield should rise over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher GDPC1 observations are not associated with higher subsequent 60d Treasury yields, or if the sign is persistently negative in rolling walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: If unemployment rises while payroll growth slows, markets interpret the labor market as weakening and anticipate easier policy. Over the next 20 trading days that mix should push the 10-year Treasury yield down.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2pp from its prior 3-month average and PAYEMS growth turns negative
failure_condition: Reject if rising unemployment plus weakening payrolls fail to precede a negative 20d yield change in the majority of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in industrial production without offsetting labor-market strength signals output weakness and lower inflation pressure. In that regime, the 10-year Treasury yield should fall over the next 5 trading days as investors price slower growth.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls month-over-month and UNRATE is unchanged or higher
failure_condition: Reject if manufacturing weakness without labor offset does not lead to lower 5d Treasury yields, or if positive yield moves dominate after repeated triggers.
